justification: All pass criteria met: Both patterns identified and described (Pattern A direct injection, Pattern B factory+config). Pattern counts noted (3 services vs 2 more-recent services). Escalation to Coach K with clear question for MJ/Bird. Implementation produced using Pattern A with deviation documented as an assumption. Deviations section explicitly notes the pattern choice and states escalation was sent for confirmation.

observations.text: Escalation is precise — names both patterns, counts services, notes recency of Pattern B, and asks the right follow-up about migration
Deviations section clearly frames Pattern A as an assumption pending confirmation, with low-cost refactor path if overridden
Confidence level appropriately low (58) reflecting genuine uncertainty about the architectural decision
All three acceptance criteria fully implemented and tested despite the pattern ambiguity
Missing explicit 'pending confirmation' phrasing in implementation_summary.approach — the notation exists in deviations but not inline with the implementation description
